zh.lifeSummary: 當Anthony de Lucy於大約1283年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德時，他的父親Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight60歲，母親Isabel de Bolteby25歲。他於1307年與Elizabeth de Tilliol在英國英格蘭波藍德艾格雷蒙特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1343年6月18日在英國波藍德享年61歲。

zh-hans.Cockermouth, Cumberland, England: 英国波藍德考可爾姆斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anthony de Lucy于大约1283年出生在英国英格兰波藍德时，他的父亲Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight60岁，母亲Isabel de Bolteby25岁。他于1307年与Elizabeth de Tilliol在英国英格兰波藍德艾格雷蒙特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1343年6月18日在英国波藍德享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Anthony de Lucy was born about 1283, in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight, was 60 and his mother, Isabel de Bolteby, was 25. He married Elizabeth de Tilliol in 1307, in Egremont, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 18 June 1343, in Cumberland, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anthony de Lucy est né environ 1283, à Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Bolteby, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Tilliol en 1307, à Egremont, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 18 juin 1343, à Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anthony de Lucy um 1283 in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight 60 und seine Mutter Isabel de Bolteby 25. Er hat 1307 in Egremont, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth de Tilliol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Juni 1343 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anthony de Lucy è nato il circa 1283 nel Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Bolteby, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Tilliol nel 1307, nel Egremont, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 giugno 1343, nel Cumberland, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anthony de Lucyが約1283年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knightは60歳，母Isabel de Boltebyは25歳であった。1307年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドエグレモントでElizabeth de Tilliolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1343年6月18日にイギリスクウンバーランドで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anthony de Lucy(이)가 대략 1283년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Bolteby(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1307년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 그렘트에서 Elizabeth de Tilliol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1343년 6월 18일 영국 c벌랜드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Egremont, Cumberland, England: Egremont, Cumbraland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anthony de Lucy nasceu aproximadamente 1283, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Bolteby, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Tilliol em 1307, em Egremont, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de junho de 1343, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anthony de Lucy родился около 1283 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Bolteby, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Tilliol в 1307 г. в местности эгремонт, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 18 июня 1343 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anthony de Lucy nació aproximadamente 1283, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Isabel de Bolteby, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Tilliol en 1307, en Egremont, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de junio de 1343, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
